acceptance_targets: [chapter_04_booker_01] Pass if, by the end of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:245 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:275, a first-time reader can point to a specific on-page reason Silas may still report back to Gideon and help execute a public name even after agreeing to return to Sump Ward. Fail if chapter 05's launch would still read like a turn that happened mostly between chapters.

[chapter_04_craft_01] Pass if the revised stretch between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:37 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:195 contains at least one encounter whose main turn is not verbal explanation but observable consequence or conflict, and if Inez's later explanation adds information not already supplied in the same form by the previous witnesses. Fail if the sequence still reads as a stack of case studies proving one thesis.

[chapter_04_prose_01] Pass if, after revision, no more than one of the cited spans still relies on an explicit self-correcting formula of the 'not X / but Y' or immediate restatement kind, and the other cited beats arrive through materially different syntax or concrete detail. Fail if those moments still echo each other as the same sentence move.

[FBR-002] Pass if the three cited lines no longer use self-labeling hinge language and each realization is carried by local scene evidence; fail if the chapter still pauses three times to announce understanding rather than letting the reader infer it.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, by the end of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:245 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:275, a first-time reader can point to a specific on-page reason Silas may still report back to Gideon and help execute a public name even after agreeing to return to Sump Ward. Fail if chapter 05's launch would still read like a turn that happened mostly between chapters.
findings.problem: The chapter lands Silas's discovery cleanly, but it underprepares the next-step turn into chapter 05's branded launch. He rejects the single-word solution, sees the ward's practical logic, and commits to coming back, yet the Gideon obligation remains too submerged to make his imminent return to uphill branding feel causally loaded rather than off-page whiplash.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the refusal beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:185, the scaffold-wall hypothetical at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:223, and the closing bargain at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:245 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:265 so Gideon's pressure is present as a concrete deadline, promise, or lie Silas is actively carrying. Keep the genuine shift toward Inez, but make the chapter end with two live obligations on the page: the ward apprenticeship and the branded campaign he is still trapped inside.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised stretch between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:37 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:195 contains at least one encounter whose main turn is not verbal explanation but observable consequence or conflict, and if Inez's later explanation adds information not already supplied in the same form by the previous witnesses. Fail if the sequence still reads as a stack of case studies proving one thesis.
findings.problem: The middle of the chapter teaches the same lesson in too many similar demonstration beats: resident names a strain, Silas asks what if it were called something else, the resident explains the practical consequence, then Inez restates the thesis. The cumulative effect is procedural clarity at the expense of live pressure, so discovery starts to feel curated instead of hard-won.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework at least one of the explanatory runs anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:89, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:167 so it produces a material complication rather than another clean testimonial. Options: have Silas misname a bed and trigger an immediate consequence, let two residents disagree about a use-name, or force Inez to solve a practical problem while teaching him. Then trim the thesis-summary at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:195 so it adds new pressure instead of restating what the reader already learned.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after revision, no more than one of the cited spans still relies on an explicit self-correcting formula of the 'not X / but Y' or immediate restatement kind, and the other cited beats arrive through materially different syntax or concrete detail. Fail if those moments still echo each other as the same sentence move.
findings.problem: The prose repeats a self-correcting insight formula more than twice: perception arrives as negation, then gets renamed more precisely. Used once, this is controlled; repeated across the chapter, it starts to sound like authored cadence rather than scene-specific thinking and flattens several emotional turns into the same rhythm.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the perception beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:69, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:113, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:207, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:263 so at least three of them land through different machinery: action, bodily sensation, image, interruption, or a cleaner declarative sentence. Keep the underlying emotional precision, but stop using the same not-X/actually-Y corrective shape to deliver it.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the three cited lines no longer use self-labeling hinge language and each realization is carried by local scene evidence; fail if the chapter still pauses three times to announce understanding rather than letting the reader infer it.
findings.problem: Full-book explanatory hinge pattern ('There it was' / 'That landed') appears in 13 chapters, and this chapter compounds it three times at 1462, 1518, and 1568. The repeated summary cueing flattens a chapter that is otherwise strongest when it lets labor and embarrassment speak for themselves.
findings.rewrite_direction: REPLACE the hinge sentences at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1462, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1518, and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1568. Use Timo's correction, Inez's questions, and Silas's bodily miscalibration on the planks to convey the realizations without editorial labeling. Keep the chapter inside observed action and tactile consequence.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's strange civic biology, vulgar humor, erotic consequence, and class abrasion. When a choice appears between the cleaner version and the truer, messier one, choose the messier version so long as causality and character truth remain exact. Treat the city's slime, smell, heat, and appetite as part of the novel's beauty rather than embarrassment to be polished away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, shame, hunger, class humiliation, bodily mess, or economic pressure starts drifting into decorous vagueness, rewrite until the scene carries concrete sensory and social cost on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should signal emphasis, class performance, ceremonial language, or Gideon's deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate crowd scenes with cleanup, ritual with labor, public humiliation with private tenderness, and single-sweep chapters with multi-scene accumulations; no two consecutive chapters should feel built from the same emotional weather, dialogue density, or scene rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Period-aware but not museum-stiff; vivid, bodily, class-conscious, and willing to be ugly or funny without slipping into arch parody or modern snark.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored to Silas Vale for the full novel, with no head-hopping and no neutral historian voice; Inez remains legible through observed action, dialogue, and the objects she shares.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Elastic and pressure-sensitive: quick comic snap in public scenes, thicker sensory accumulation in labor and erotic passages, and hard clean sentences at moments of shame or decision.
